signals.headline: Annual core inflation** hit 3
signals.raw: Annual core inflation** hit 3.9% pre-oil shock (raising 3-month annualized core PCE to 4.56%, over double the 2% target), with Fed holding rates at 3.50-3.75% and dot plot showing debate on hikes vs. cuts[1].
